description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish and two red bands on the stock. It is equipped with a collapsible skeletonized stock, a suppressor attached to the barrel, and a mounted optical sight, likely a red dot or holographic type. The rifle includes a detachable box magazine and a sturdy sling for carrying. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal, with polymer components for the grip and stock. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable firearm suitable for urban operations. The visible controls and ergonomic grip indicate ease of handling and rapid deployment.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a collapsible skeletonized stock, suppressor, optical sight, and red accent bands, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, collapsible skeletonized stock, suppressor, optical sight, and sling.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor, sight alignment, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, sling attachment, and the back of the optical sight.
